args.subject: Your pro-rata Halcyon refund
args.body: A pro-rata refund of 240.00 has been issued to order ORD-3320 following the end of your Halcyon contract.

args.text: Refund of 240.00 issued to ORD-3320 and customer notified at accounts@fernwood.example.

args.subject: Fernwood Ltd: deletion schedule confirmed
args.body: Deletion schedule confirmed: exported datasets (crm_contacts, invoices, usage_events, support_threads) will be deleted on 2026-06-13, 30 days after export.

args.subject: Fernwood Ltd offboarding complete
args.body: Fernwood Ltd offboarding is complete: access revoked, pro-rata refund issued, and deletion schedule confirmed.
